name: gold-price
title: Gold Price
description: Daily gold price per gram (24K/22K/21K/18K) with 1, 3, 6, and 12-month averages.
author: noice_anas

commands.name: gold-price
commands.title: Gold Price
commands.subtitle: Gold Price
commands.description: Show the current gold price per gram and 1/3/6/12-month averages.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: metals.dev API Key
preferences.description: Your free metals.dev API key. Get one at https://metals.dev/pricing (free tier: 100 requests/month).

preferences.name: currency
preferences.title: Display Currency
preferences.description: Currency prices are fetched in and displayed as. Switching currencies costs one API request, then caches for 12h.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
